hn.t: n. 血凝素神经氨酸酶
hn.d: n a colorless explosive liquid that is volatile and poisonous and foul-smelling

hn2.t: [化] 氮芥; 二·甲基胺; 二氯乙基·甲基胺

hnc.t: abbr. 国家高级合格证书（Higher National Certificate）

hnd.t: abbr. 国家高等技术学校毕业证书（Higher National Diploma）；损伤命中率（Hit No Damage）
hnd.d: n a diploma given for vocational training that prepares the student for a career in a particular area; good students may progress to a course leading to a degree

hne.t: [医][=human neutrophil elastase]人嗜中性细胞弹性蛋白酶

hnggins-miller-jensen test.t: [医] 哈-米-晏三氏试验, 哈金斯氏试验(检癌)

hnh.t: abbr. hypothalamic neuronal hamartoma 下丘脑神经元错构瘤

hnil interface device.t: [计] 高抗扰度接触口器件

hnis.t: abbr. Human Nutrition Information Service 人类营养信息服务部门

hnpcc.t: [医]遗传性非息肉性结肠直肠癌
